name: debate protocol: arbitrate after 3 COUNTER rounds of disagreement
description: Verifies runDebate exhausts MAX_COUNTER_ROUNDS=3 and invokes quality_judge when debaters never agree. Reviewer always flags BLOCKER at src/auth.js:42; security_auditor always flags BLOCKER at src/payment.js:100. Different location sets → disagree at PROPOSE and every COUNTER round. Expected: verdict=ARBITRATED, debate_log.length=9 (2 PROPOSE + 6 COUNTER + 1 ARBITRATE), last speaker is quality_judge.
